name: coverage expansion wave 1
summary: Expands the normalization catalog and conversion registry to include LDL cholesterol, HDL cholesterol, triglycerides, and creatinine, with a dedicated slice-specific verification script and fixture.
user_visible_flows: operator runs normalize on the expanded coverage fixture and receives mapped lipid and renal outputs
system_flows: new aliases resolve to deterministic biomarker definitions
new mmol/L and umol/L conversions normalize into canonical mg/dL values
unsupported specimens still route to review-needed instead of silent mapping
notes: The primary verification artifact for this slice is the dedicated on-the-spot verification script rather than a generic static test file.
